name: QUICKLOGIC Corp
summary: QuickLogic Corporation is a semiconductor company that develops low-power multi-core voice and sensor processing solutions, embedded FPGA (eFPGA) IP, and platforms for AI/ML at the edge. Its products include programmable FPGAs, eFPGA IP cores, and sensor processing solutions targeting IoT, defense, industrial, and consumer markets. The company also provides engineering services and contracts with the U.S. Government for defense-related applications.

products.name: eFPGA IP
products.description: Embedded FPGA intellectual property cores for integration into customer SoC designs

products.name: Sensor Processing Solutions
products.description: Low-power multi-core voice and sensor processing platforms for IoT and edge AI applications

products.name: Radiation-tolerant FPGAs
products.description: FPGAs designed for defense and space applications requiring radiation tolerance

products.name: Silicon Platforms
products.description: Programmable silicon platforms targeting AI/ML inference at the edge

partnerships.description: Government contracts for defense-related semiconductor and platform development

partnerships.partner_name: Third-party silicon IP and RTL providers
partnerships.description: Partnerships for silicon IP, RTL, design, physical design, verification, and assembly
Dependencies on third parties for fabrication, assembly, testing, and programming of products
